query: SELECT mt.id, mt.goalId, mt.month, mt.targetValue, mt.actualValue, ag.goalName, ag.strategicObjective FROM monthlyTargets mt JOIN annualGoals ag ON mt.goalId = ag.id WHERE mt.year = 2026 ORDER BY ag.strategicObjective, mt.goalId, mt.month LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2WVoNFXx8YRPBD4.root --database JzcMSgtkjzvCc45KUk33Lc --execute SELECT mt.id, mt.goalId, mt.month, mt.targetValue, mt.actualValue, ag.goalName, ag.strategicObjective FROM monthlyTargets mt JOIN annualGoals ag ON mt.goalId = ag.id WHERE mt.year = 2026 ORDER BY ag.strategicObjective, mt.goalId, mt.month LIMIT 30;
